title: Creating tasks automatically by assigning comments on Google Drive files

posts.author: MaxCR86 (Max C. Reuveni)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey guys!

I’m looking for a way to integrate assigned comments in Google drive documents into Monday automatically.

Having the comments placed on the drive document makes it a lot clearer in context, and assigning comments on drive is a feature our team uses very often.

Is there currently any way of automatically creating Monday tasks through assigned comments? Maybe even see the comments as replies to the task on Monday, to be able to easily follow up through it, without having to open the file itself?

Thanks!

posts.author: MaxCR86 (Max C. Reuveni)
posts.cookedHtml: So has no one else found this need?

posts.author: lauralev (Laura Levy)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @MaxCR86! Thanks for sharing this feedback with us - currently we are working on how to improve and enhance our google drive integration. I’d be happy to pass this onward to our team as feedback. I’m not sure in all transparency, the complexity it will take to pull in comments on a doc as new items but I wouldn’t rule it out either Stay tuned on developments here! Cheers!

posts.author: MaxCR86 (Max C. Reuveni)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would love to see that feature make its way in!
Will def stay tuned

posts.author: MartinBeck (Martin Beck)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi folks… I’m assuming that this never happened. It would be super helpful. Any chance that some intrepid developer would want to pick it up now?

posts.author: adoryable (Dory Hack)
posts.cookedHtml: Searching for this exact feature! How can I create new records (“tasks”) right from a Google Doc? Comments seems a natural way, but I’d be satisfied with other workarounds…

posts.author: CarlosVeliz (Carlos)
posts.cookedHtml: 2025 and still waiting for that feature!

posts.author: huysgt (HarryNg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

If you’re using Google Workspace, you might know that you can now assign tasks directly from Google Docs:

Workspace Updates Blog

Google Workspace Updates: Easily assign Tasks from Google Docs

We’ve recently built an app that takes it a step further — it automatically syncs your Google Tasks with your monday.com boards, so you don’t have to copy them over manually.

We’re offering free access for anyone who’d like to give it a try.

Try it out here
